name: China
q1_economic: World's 2nd largest economy. 25% crude imports from Gulf. Already has non-hostile access to Hormuz.
q2_psychological: National rejuvenation. Multi-alignment strategic ambiguity as core doctrine.
q4_multi_party: Sells to both US (trade) and Iran (oil via non-hostile). Invoked blocking rule against US sanctions.

verified_actions.action: Co-vetoed UN SC Hormuz resolution with Russia
Ships broadcasting CHINA OWNER transiting via non-hostile framework
Wang Yi tells Iran to open Hormuz while blocking UN mechanism
